Why Choose Us

World-Class Facilities
For Focused Students

Located on Nala Patri, Arya Puri, Shamli — Avinav Library is built for students who are serious about their preparation. Every detail is designed to maximize your concentration and comfort.

❄️

Air Conditioned

Stay cool and focused with fully air-conditioned study halls throughout the library.

📶

High-Speed Wi-Fi

Reliable, fast internet connection for uninterrupted online study and research.

📷

24/7 CCTV Security

Complete CCTV coverage at entrance, parking, and reception for your safety.

🚗

Parking Area

Dedicated parking space for vehicles — bikes and scooters welcome.

💧

RO Purified Water

Cold, clean drinking water available — chilled during summer months.

🚺

Separate for Girls

Dedicated separate seating area for female students for privacy and comfort.

📰

Newspaper Daily

Hindi and English newspapers available every day for current affairs preparation.

🧹

Daily Cleaning

Toilets and all areas cleaned every morning before students arrive.

📚

Book Shelf

Reference book shelf available for students to access essential study materials.

📋 LIBRARY RULES

📵Keep your phone on silent mode inside the library at all times.
🤞No shouting or loud talking. Maintain silence to respect other students.
🚫Outsiders are not allowed to enter without permission. Violation results in 1-month debarment.

Inside Avinav Library

How To Join

Admission Process

  1. 1

    Contact Us

    Call 079839 18672 or email kapilmalik30596@gmail.com to register your interest.

  2. 2

    Submit Aadhar Card

    A soft copy (photo or scan) of your Aadhar card is mandatory for verification and admission.

  3. 3

    Make Payment

    Payment must be submitted within 2 days of admission day. Cash and UPI both accepted.

  4. 4

    Get Your Receipt

    An official receipt will be provided for your payment. Keep it safe for any future reference.

📍 Location
